textByHashes.5fd39bac3bfab77c12e6e0020dd407dc8dcde6cc: Huh, it looks like Gadderanks is still alive. Perhaps he's ready to give us some information before he meets his maker.
textByHashes.53353f1f06cf4acac9518376c9ffc0ac8230556d: Don't mention it. Have you had any luck with finding us a new hideout?
textByHashes.20d2d29d2a69130072e228f78e04eb2a5bf1dc1e: Excellent! Now, I must return to the Hollows. Please, meet me there so we can arrange getting everyone down here safely.
